summary: Frontend testing completed for VMS360 Dashboard - Dashboard location filters, Scheduled Reports page, SMTP settings, and Logout button visibility. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Dashboard loads with FilterBar component - PASSED
Region dropdown opens and shows all regions (Marmara, Ege, Akdeniz, İç Anadolu, Karadeniz, Doğu Anadolu, Güneydoğu Anadolu) - PASSED
City dropdown loads cities when region is selected (İstanbul, Bursa, Kocaeli, etc.) - PASSED
District dropdown loads districts when city is selected (Kadıköy, Beşiktaş, Şişli, etc.) - PASSED
Clear filters button (Temizle) works correctly - PASSED
Scheduled Reports page (Planlı Raporlar) loads correctly - PASSED
SMTP Settings dialog opens and can be filled - PASSED
SMTP settings save successfully (toast: SMTP ayarları kaydedildi) - PASSED
New scheduled report creation works (toast: Planlı rapor oluşturuldu) - PASSED
Logout button visible in dark theme (text color: rgb(242, 242, 242)) - PASSED
Logout button visible in light theme (text color: rgb(34, 34, 42)) - PASSED
Logout functionality works - redirects to login page - PASSED
Backend API /api/regions returns location data - PASSED
Backend API /api/settings/smtp returns SMTP configuration - PASSED
Backend API /api/scheduled-reports returns scheduled reports list - PASSED
seed_data_creation: Regions, cities, districts pre-seeded. SMTP settings and scheduled reports created during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features tested and working: 1) Dashboard location filters (Bölge/İl/İlçe) with cascading dropdowns, 2) Scheduled Reports page with SMTP configuration and report creation, 3) Logout button visible in both dark and light themes. APScheduler is configured to check scheduled reports every minute.
